div.class: relative w-[1280px] h-[720px] overflow-hidden bg-[#08090f] font-[noto-sans]

text.class: absolute left-[40px] top-[30px] font-[orbitron] font-black text-[260px] leading-[0.8] text-[#00d4ff] opacity-[0.06]

div.class: absolute left-[64px] top-[48px] right-[64px] flex items-center justify-between font-[jmono] text-[16px] tracking-[4px] text-[#607080]

text.class: relative font-[orbitron] font-black text-[118px] leading-[0.88] tracking-[1px] text-[#f0f4f8] [text-shadow:0_0_10px_rgba(0,255,136,0.3)]

div.text: clipPath inset slices + pseudo text layers + deterministic JS animation

div.class: absolute left-[88px] bottom-[78px] w-[760px] h-[10px] bg-[#131722] border-[1px] border-[#2a3342]

text.class: absolute left-[88px] bottom-[104px] font-[jmono] text-[16px] tracking-[4px] text-[#607080]

div.class: absolute left-[42px] top-[42px] w-[28px] h-[28px] border-l-[2px] border-t-[2px] border-[#00ff8890]
absolute right-[42px] top-[42px] w-[28px] h-[28px] border-r-[2px] border-t-[2px] border-[#00d4ff90]
absolute left-[42px] bottom-[42px] w-[28px] h-[28px] border-l-[2px] border-b-[2px] border-[#ff00ff90]
absolute right-[42px] bottom-[42px] w-[28px] h-[28px] border-r-[2px] border-b-[2px] border-[#00ff8890]
